_comment: Language analysis fixture template. Copy to tests/fixtures/<language>/language.json.
_instructions: All 'from' and 'to' values are UTF-16 code unit offsets (same as JavaScript string .length).
sourceText must match text.slice(sourceFromUtf16, sourceToUtf16) exactly.
normalizedText is the provider's internal normalized form (may equal sourceText).
'known' means the word exists in the provider's dictionary.
'knownPrefix' means the word is a prefix of at least one known word (enables completion).
Non-BMP characters: U+10000 occupies 2 UTF-16 code units but 4 UTF-8 bytes.

cases.name: normalized form differs from source (e.g. ZWSP/ZWNJ stripped)
latin text in a script document is routed to latin provider
cases._comment: The provider under test should only emit tokens for its own script range.

expected_tokens._comment: Only the script word should appear; Latin ranges handled by another provider.

cases.name: non-BMP code point in surrounding text does not panic
cases._comment: U+10437 (Deseret SMALL LETTER YEE) occupies 2 UTF-16 code units.

cases.name: 100-word document analyzes within 100ms p95
cases._comment: This is a marker entry. Run performance assertions separately in performanceDiagnostics.test.ts.
